title: Matekxy 2022 AirPods Pro 2nd Generation Case with Silicone Lanyard, Full Protection Shockproof and Dustproof Portable Cover with Keychain, Support Apple AirPods Wireless Charging - Red
description:
Matekxy AirPods Pro 2nd silicone case is designed for the new 2022 AirPods Pro 2nd only.
The AirPods Pro 2nd Case Cover is a one-piece design, with the top cover connected to the cover.
It fits tightly with the AirPods Pro 2nd and will not come off as easily.
After putting the protective cover on the headset, the LED light is visible so you can know if the case is charging or if it is fully charged.
There is also a small flag at the bottom to be able to cover the charging port. Covering the small flag when not charging will effectively prevent dust from entering.
In addition, you can hang it outside your backpack or on your hand with the configured keychain and lanyard, very convenient to carry.
What you'll get:
AirPods Pro 2nd Silicone Case
Silicone Lanyard
Black Keychain
features: Match Model: Matekxy simple, sophisticated and stylish AirPods case will accurately match the AirPods Pro 2 released in 2022. Good-looking, easy to use, and able to protect the headphones in all aspects.

Upgraded Shockproof Silicone Material: Light-weight Airpods Pro 2nd generation case skin case is made of soft-touch durable silicone material, completly protecting against fingerprint, scratches, bumps, anti-shock and anti-slip.
Convenient Charging: Front LED visible design and the bottom opening lightning charging design makes charging easier, support wire and wireless charging (But Not For Apple Watch Charger).

Portable Design: Portable travel designed Airpods Pro 2 case cover with carabiner Silicone Lanyard and Keychain. The removable rope and keychain are easy to attach to key ring, belt or computer bag which makes it convenient and secure to carry your Airpods Pro 2 anywhere.
Package Include: 1 * case for Airpods Pro 2nd generation 2022, 1 * Metal Buckle, 1 * Silicone Lanyard

reviews.title: Best for DVDs and Inserts - HIGHLY RECOMMENDED
reviews.text: I've tried a few of these DVD albums, and this is best of the rest. The insert section is roomy enough so you only have to fold along one line and it will slide in comfortably  thus you can see the front and title edge. With Bellagio, you have to double fold, and it creases your insert more than you might want, especially if you think someday you might resell them -- messes with the aesthetics. As far as room, I can slip in 2 inserts, moving one up and under the blank space above and keeping the other low, so able to utilize every slot without feeling like I'm cheating myself by not having both inserts. In addition, for those annoying 3 disc DVDs/BluRay sets, you can slide one of the discs in with the insert, and it will be safe there. It's a sturdy product. I've been using my 240 count for 3 years now, and just bought a 120 in June. The 240 has held up very nicely, and I expect the same of the 120. If you have a large collection you want to transfer, you might want to do some planning ahead of time on how you want group your DVDs, because once you have packed your album, it is difficult to move pages around to reorganize. I had to remove my DVD and inserts. As long as it's not packed, you can manage. The metal clip is very strong and it's a firm hold, but when the slots are full, the bulk of it slides all the pages out because the pages are slick. I didn't have help to hold them in place, and you're going to need it. Leave a few empty in your groupings for new DVDs. The pages themselves are a good quality plastic and soft backing to avoid scratching. It's nicely balanced. I would recommend the 120 more than the 240 because it's easier to carry and store when full but as I said, my 240 has held up very nicely in 3 years. It is currently about 16# full. I don't carry the 240 by the handle. Don't want to push my luck. I can find no damage or weakening in it and every single original page is double packed with CDs  & Inserts, plus, I swiped a few pages from the 120 to put into the 240.  The downside is, if the pages ever do start to rip or tear, you can't find refills -- I've looked.  I have no hesitation in recommending this to anyone wanting to get away from cases and consolidate your DVD collection.  I just haven't found anything else I'm happy with.

reviews.title: Pros and Cons
reviews.text: Pros:  I really like these holders.  I would give it a 5 star if they were all alike.  two are as demoed in the video and two are totally different.  Cons:  The two white/clear holders are totally different from the blamk and pink.  The clear back just snaps on, and does not completely close and lock with the circle ring.  If it snaps apart, you could loose the airtag!!!  I decided to keep them because I do like the pink and black.  I put the other two in my car in case it was stolen.  The other two I can put on my key ring.  Very nice holder, just wish all four were like the pink and black.  It does NOT show this in the demo video.

Detachable earmuff design, the earmuff material is made of PU leather material, which is easy to replace.Special campus channel: With memory function, it can memorize the frequency points and saved frequency points before shutting down (or changing the battery).LCD display: LCD liquid crystal display is clearer and more intuitive than pointer display, which is convenient to quickly adjust to the required channel.Reception FM radio: supports FM (No AM) transistor radio with an automatic search and store feature which can make up to 11 preset stations for you to cycle through your favorites.Specification:Model: HRD-308SMaterial: ABS+PU leather Color: white, black, blue, orangeFM receiving range: 50-108MHZSensitivity: ≤18dBFrequency Response: 20Hz-18KHzWorking voltage: 3V Battery: 2*AA batteries(not included)Size: 115mm x 88mm x 120mm/4.53" x 3.46" x 4.72" (Approx.)Package:1 pc x Headphone1 pc x User manualNote:1. Due to the light and screen difference, the item's color may be slightly different from the pictures.2. Please allow 1-2 cm differences due to manual measurement.
features: External antenna design: it enhances the receiving sensitivity of the product and increases the sensitivity of about 2-3DB compared with wireless earphones; reduces the noise-limiting sensitivity of earphones, so that the earphone receiving sound quality is clearer, and students can listen to the exams clearly.

Clear listening: the DSP software digital processing integrated module is used as the radio core, with high amplifier, local oscillator, mixing and frequency discrimination circuits, digital filtering design, built-in dual 16bit digital-to-analog converters, high-performance selective, Strong anti-interference ability and low audio distortion output characteristics.

Ergonomic design: oval-shaped earmuffs are comfortable to wear and can fully cove the ears to effectively isolate external noise. Detachable earmuff design, the earmuff material is made of PU leather material, which is easy to replace.

Speaker and LCD display: adopts 40MM large-diameter drive unit, high-magnetic neodymium iron boron magnetic material structure, professional anti-noise, beautiful and clear sound quality, high sensitivity, and the stereophonic design of the product line shows an excellent bass effect.LCD liquid crystal display is clearer and more intuitive than pointer display, which is convenient to quickly adjust to the required channel.

Reception FM radio: supports FM (No AM) transistor radio with an automatic search and store feature which can make up to 11 preset stations for you to cycle through your favorites. With memory function, it can memorize the frequency points and saved frequency points before shutting down (or changing the battery).

reviews.title: Cute cat
reviews.text: These are so cute with the cat cartoon design which is loved not only by me but by my kids this. They are perfect for work, study, sports, or travel. They would make wonderful gift as they will be so loved and admired. It offers up to 36hrs of playback time and don't need to be charged everyday like most do. It can be used together or individually for up to 6hrs of playing music and the case offers up to a 36hrs of charge allowing you to easily charge it multiple times before having to charge the case again. It easily fits even the smaller ear canals with 3 different sized tips. They stay comfortable in your ear no matter how long you use them. Easy hands free pairing via Bluetooth. Very easy to use and control volume or make calls or use siri voice. It has a shocking deep bass for better sound quality

reviews.title: Great earbuds that fit well, sound good, and have long battery life!
reviews.text: The earbuds have pretty good sound and the main reason I love them is most earbuds don't fit well in my ears, but the ear fins make it snug and a good fit. They are fairly easy to connect to bluetooth devices. The case seems to hold a lot of battery and lasts a long time and I like that it charges with USB-C. The ear fins on the earbuds make it very snug and a good fit in my ears, and this also makes it noise cancelling. The case is a nice small size too. I've used it for almost a month and I have no complaints about them :)

reviews.title: Nice, just don't like having to remove them to charge it
reviews.text: I really like them and my AirPods feel much more secure in my ears.  I can move my head and they don't fall out.  The only thing I don't like is that they won't charge in the charger unless you remove them.

reviews.title: Solves AirPod Issue
reviews.text: I have a love/hate relationship with my AirPods and these are making me love them a LOT more. On their own, my AirPods cause my ears to hurt terribly. Not to mention, they fall out at the slightest movement, like smiling or turning my head. Talk about ANNOYING. These tips cure those ailments. Now I can exercise with my AirPods in and never worry about them falling out. I have tiny ears, and the fit is great with no discomfort at all. I love that the little hook sticks up into the cartilage of my ear to make a really secure fit. The silicon keeps the buds from irritating my ears too. I’m so happy I got these. Now I can actually put my AirPods to good use.

reviews.title: These Really Help to Keep the AirPods 2nd gen in Place.

Never miss a call because you can't hear over the music. Thanks to the built in mic, you can answer and end calls right from the headphones.
